title: BUG #19018: high memory usage and "stack depth limit exceeded", with GiST index on ltree
poc: CREATE INDEX ON comment USING gist (path);
key_bug_features: GiST index creation on ltree causes high memory usage
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE comment (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, path ltree NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE INDEX ON comment USING gist (path);
